items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 been playing this for a year and a half
items.summary: been playing this for a year and a half or more the game play is tedious but fun the character pull is very generous It's simple and neat and I could tell all the budget goes to the art style The story or lore of this game has given me so much emotions that I could express my love for this game in short it's amazing
items.author: Troy Garcia
